name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style — Grey/Pink Heart
name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Custom Heart Style — Grey/Pink Heart
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side features custom high-quality rain-dew linen 〽️, finished with a glossy resin coating [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟. The leather is made of top-grain calfskin 👛, flexible and non-irritating 💪. With custom hand-painted details, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm and card holder 🎀➕gift box 🎁➕upgraded manual 💌
Size: Top opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base width 10cm
🔎020660
